示
四
National Standard of the People”s Republic of China
GB 17896一2022
Replace GB 17896一2012,GB 19574一2004,GB 20053一2015,GB 29143一2012
Minimum allowable values of energy
efficiency and energy efficiency grades
of ballasts for gas discharge lamps for
general lighting
普通照明用气体放电灯用镇流器能效
限定值及能效等级
(CEnglish Translation )
Issue date: 2022-12-29                       Implementation date: 2024-01-01
lssued by _ State Administration for Market Regulation
Standardization Administration
